description: Verso: Bill of divorce. Location: Fustat. Dated: 1564 Seleucid, which is 1252/53 CE. Husband: Nissim b. Sar Shalom ha-Levi of Damascus, the same husband from recto. This document was not completed. See also ENA 2559.15 (PGPID 11080) for another unsigned geṭ between the same couple from the preceding year.
description_he: גט, פוסטאט, 1564 לשטרות = 1252/53: אותו בעל, נסים בן שר שלום הלוי מדמשק. המסמך לא הושלם.
